+        total_reward = 0

+            # Update state

+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Train PPO agent on Minigrid environments')

+    parser.add_argument('--envs', nargs='+', type=str, default=ENVIRONMENTS,

+                        help='List of environments to train on')

+    parser.add_argument('--episodes', type=int, default=500,

+                        help='Number of episodes to train for')

+    parser.add_argument('--max_episodes', type=int, default=1000,

+                        help='Maximum number of episodes')

+    parser.add_argument('--update_timestep', type=int, default=2000,

+                        help='Update policy every n timesteps')

+    parser.add_argument('--lr', type=float, default=0.0003,

+                        help='Learning rate')

     

     args = parser.parse_args()

     

+    # Use the provided arguments
